figures.caption: Figure 1: HiDDEN/found overview and demonstration A: Schematic of the HiDDEN pipeline, including embedding, continuous scoring, and discretization steps. B: Example usage of the found library in Python. C: Example usage of the found library in R. D: Example usage of visualization utilities from the found.pl module in Python. E: Evaluation of HiDDEN outputs on IL-15-stimulated PBMC data (PBS as control).
